security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: https://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: https://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:9002 ws://127.0.0.1:9002 https:;

bundle.shortDescription: End-to-end encrypted chat on AXL + ENS.
bundle.longDescription: Anton is an end-to-end encrypted desktop messenger built on AXL and ENS. Each user is name.anton.eth, identities are derived from a single BIP39 seed, and chat is ephemeral by design — only an encrypted vault and a tiny settings file ever touch disk.
